mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id WHERE r.code = 'author' AND r.deleted_flag = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND u.deleted_flag = 0 AND u.status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE review_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_conversation WHERE conversation_type = 'group' AND scene_type = 'user_group' AND status = 1 AND created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at < #{endTime}
